title: phyllanthus discolor var. pallidus
intro: Phyllanthus discolor var. pallidus, also known as the yellow green leaf Phyllanthus, is a plant species within the Phyllanthus genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus discolor var. pallidus include its potential to treat liver and kidney disorders, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and its leaves and roots can be used to make infusions, with the leaves said to have a more pronounced medicinal effect.
